NLD-INPUT-001.name: character_by_character_sending
NLD-INPUT-001.description: Input sent as individual keystrokes instead of buffered lines
symptoms: Raw keystroke streaming instead of command parsing
NLD-INPUT-001.root_cause: PTY or WebSocket configured in raw character mode
NLD-INPUT-001.prevention_strategy: Implement proper line buffering and command aggregation

NLD-INPUT-002.name: missing_enter_key_buffering
NLD-INPUT-002.description: Enter key not properly buffering complete command lines
symptoms: Commands not executing on Enter press
NLD-INPUT-002.root_cause: Event handlers not accumulating input until line termination
NLD-INPUT-002.prevention_strategy: Buffer input until \n or \r\n detected, then send complete line

NLD-INPUT-003.name: pty_raw_mode_issues
NLD-INPUT-003.description: Terminal PTY configured incorrectly for interactive use
symptoms: No input echoing or double echoing
NLD-INPUT-003.root_cause: PTY mode settings inappropriate for shell interaction
NLD-INPUT-003.prevention_strategy: Configure PTY in canonical mode with proper echo settings

NLD-INPUT-004.name: websocket_keystroke_streaming
NLD-INPUT-004.description: WebSocket sending individual keystrokes instead of command batches
symptoms: High frequency of small WebSocket messages
NLD-INPUT-004.root_cause: WebSocket event handler firing on every keypress
NLD-INPUT-004.prevention_strategy: Batch keystrokes and send on line completion or timeout

NLD-INPUT-005.name: command_execution_fragmentation
NLD-INPUT-005.description: Commands executed partially due to input fragmentation
NLD-INPUT-005.root_cause: Command processor receiving fragmented input stream
NLD-INPUT-005.prevention_strategy: Implement command boundary detection and atomic execution

test_patterns.description: Test that input is accumulated until newline before transmission
test_patterns.test_case: Type 'hello' + Enter, verify single command sent with newline

test_patterns.description: Test proper character deletion from input buffer
Test that multi-word commands stay intact
test_patterns.test_case: Type 'ls -la /home' + Enter, verify complete command executed

test_patterns.description: Test buffer integrity with fast input
test_patterns.test_case: Rapidly type command, verify no character loss or duplication

implementation_patterns.implementation: Maintain client-side buffer, flush on line termination
Configure PTY for line-based input processing
implementation_patterns.code_example: pty.spawn('bash', [], { name: 'xterm-color', cols: 80, rows: 24, encoding: null });

immediate_fixes: Implement client-side input buffering before WebSocket transmission
Add newline detection to trigger command sending
Configure PTY in canonical mode for proper line handling
Add input validation to prevent fragmented commands
long_term_improvements: Add command history and editing capabilities
Build automated testing for terminal interaction patterns
tdd_recommendations: Write tests for input buffering before implementation
Test edge cases: rapid typing, special characters, long commands
Mock WebSocket and PTY layers for isolated testing
Add integration tests for complete terminal workflows
